innovation_1.name: 基于双掩码与类MRI角度频率分析的物理可解释材质分类
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that material-specific angular frequency signatures enable physically interpretable surface classification through dual-mask frequency decomposition.

innovation_2.name: 结合多视角几何一致性描述子(GCD)与SAM分割的三元Mask自适应能量调整策略
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose an adaptive energy adjustment mechanism that synergizes geometric consistency with semantic segmentation to optimize processing across heterogeneous regions.

innovation_3.name: 基于BRDF物理参数拟合的分量感知融合深度估计框架
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate that component-aware BRDF parameter fitting enables physically grounded depth estimation with improved accuracy on multi-material scenes.
